SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OIP_PERDIEM_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2010; it will always be null/missing in earlier files. OIP_MDCR_PMT must be 
added to this field to obtain the total Medicare payments. 

There are two cost/use categories from the IP data files: Acute and the OIP.
